title: IVR-F RCT — Study Protocol materials (v1.0): full protocol (EN/ES), intervention manual, SPIRIT figure & checklist
author: Salvador, Carlos
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Study Protocol materials package for the IVR-F randomized controlled trial evaluating immersive virtual reality combined with therapeutic exercise in people with fibromyalgia. Contents: full protocol (English and Spanish), intervention manual with TIDieR procedures and therapist fidelity checks, and the SPIRIT figure and checklist. Purpose: enable transparency, replication, and peer review. No participant data or identifiable information are included. Trial registration: ClinicalTrials.gov NCT06948500. Package version: v1.0. Licence: CC BY 4.0. Access: embargoed until journal acceptance; a private review link is available for editors and reviewers.
